Common Use Cases For Proxies

Pricing Intelligence

Ziny Proxy servers make it easy to compare prices across multiple markets and regions. Access real-time pricing data from various sources, track market trends, spot price differences, and make strategic decisions for expansion into new areas. Hire a Ziny developer to monitor your industry. 

Price Tracking & Monitoring
Ecommerce
Amazon
Learn More

Social Media

Constant Rotating IPs, avoid CAPTCHAS and developer friendly integrations. Manage multiple accounts across all platforms, including Instagram, Facebook, Twitter, YouTube, and TikTok, with ease.
Social Media
Low Risk of Bans
Gaming
Learn More

Reputation Management

Maintain brand trust by identifying unauthorized product replicas, content misuse, and false ads. Conduct market research and safeguard your brands reputation.

Brand Monitoring
Market Research
Learn More
